title: GANG
overview: After getting into big trouble, Choi Ji-hoon is transferred to Daehoon High, the worst school in Korea. Ji-hoon's goal is simple: become the top dog of the new school by winning the school's underground fight club.

title: Be with Me
overview: Three intertwined tales reveal eerie depths: a devoted shopkeeper, teenage soulmates, and a timid guard face love's haunting shadows.

title: The Swindlers
overview: In this crime thriller, a group of unlikely allies have to work together to achieve a common goal: taking down the world’s most legendary con man.

title: The Isle
overview: A woman who sells supplies and solace to fishermen on a secluded isle becomes the object of a man's violent obsession after saving him from suicide.

title: The Hand
overview: A man and his wife, encounter a grotesque looking hand sticking out from the toilet in their bathroom. The protruding hand is very still, like a severed limb hanging low. Although they call security, and soon the cops, no one can identify, let alone predict where or what this thing is. Suddenly , all find themselves struggling for their lives as they try to fight against it.

title: Poetry
overview: Lee Chang-dong’s follow-up to his acclaimed SECRET SUNSHINE is an exquisite story about the power of art to bear witness to both sublime beauty and the violent truths that lie hidden in the hearts of men. Korean cinema legend Yoon Jeong-hee delivers a stunning performance as Mija, an aging part-time maid and full-time guardian of her apathetic grandson (Lee Da-wit). Concerned by her frequent forgetfulness, she takes a poetry class at the local arts center to sharpen her mind. She begins to appreciate the wonders of the natural world, but a schoolgirl’s suicide initiates a chain of tragic events that will change her life forever.

title: The Gossip
overview: Jeong-seok finds a job caring for a near-lifeless elderly man. In a place where there’s little to do, he and Teeth start to day-drink and gossip.

title: Sleep
overview: How well do you really know the person sleeping next to you? For one young couple, this question becomes a twisted psychological nightmare when a husband’s increasingly bizarre nighttime behavior takes a menacing turn.

title: Act
overview: A college professor invites one of her students over to her house in an attempt to expose her husband’s affair with the young woman.

title: The Call
overview: Connected by phone in the same home but 20 years apart, a serial killer puts another woman’s past — and life — on the line to change her own fate.

title: Quick
overview: A former motorcycle gang member, Gi-su witnesses the building blow up.  As he puts his helmet on, he gets a call from a stranger telling him that the helmet is booby-trapped and will blow up if he fails to make a series of deliveries within a fixed time limit.

title: My Annoying Brother
overview: Doo-shik (Jo Jung-suk) gets paroled from prison thanks to his younger brother (Doh Kyung-soo) Doo-young. Doo-young is a promising judo athlete. After 15 years, Doo-shik suddenly appears in front of Doo-young and they begin to live together. Doo-young becomes involved in an accident before the selection for the national team. Korean Language film with English subtitles.

title: Mask
overview: A young woman from a poor family assumes a wealthy woman's identity in order to have the life she longs for.

title: The Wig
overview: The sisters and a terrible present. In the dark hospital room lies a present for Soohyun, a dying cancer patient. It is a beautiful wig, which Jihyun has prepared for her. Admiring the beauty of the wig, Soohyun slowly puts it on. In no time, the reflection of Soohyun in the mirror transforms into an attractive woman full of vitality, and a mysterious power falls on her. Punishment by the wig. Jihyun feels uneasy with Soohyun’s mysteriously rapid recovery from the day she puts on the wig. Soohyun now seems to have become a completely different person and her attitude toward Jihyun’s ex-boyfriend Kiseok is not quite the same as in the past. In addition, Kyungjoo, a friend of Soohyun who has borrowed her wig, is savagely murdered, and now Soohyun murmurs unintelligible words. Something is happening to Soohyun and Jihyun is afraid of her lovely sister. And the curse of the wig falls on the sisters….

title: Gabi: Russian Coffee
overview: During Korea's first coffee boom, a man betrays his country to protect the woman he loves, becoming entangled in a deadly plot of assassination.

title: Innocent Thing
overview: An innocent high school girl’s crush on her popular gym teacher becomes a mad obsession that threatens his marriage, career, and everything he values.

title: The Treacherous
overview: The Joseon Dynasty, 1504. Upon the tyrannical king’s order, a father and son are dispatched all over the country to find women to entertain him.

title: The Flu
overview: A deadly virus is unleashed on an unsuspecting public. A human trafficker covered in oozing red rashes and coughing up blood dies at a hospital. Within hours, the virus spreads all over the city and death goes viral as the body count rapidly rises. In the city, no one gets in, no one gets out, and everything begins to spiral out of control! Korean Language film with English subtitles.

title: Tomb of the River
overview: When a crime ring starts construction on the largest casino in Asia, the group is challenged by a gangster who will stop at nothing to gain power.

title: Set Me Free
overview: Thanks to his irresponsible father, teenager Young-jae spent most of his childhood in a group home called Issac's House. After years at the group home, he is almost at the age where he has to leave.

title: The Swordsman
overview: A king’s greatest swordsman is blinded in an insurrection and retires - until his daughter is taken by traffickers and he vows to fight for her life.

title: Innocence
overview: An attorney uncovers a village's secrets while defending her estranged mother in a murder trial.

title: Go Back
overview: A motivated rookie police officer is on the case of a highly publicized child kidnapping with a ransom demanded to be routed to a welfare center.

title: The Wailing
overview: A policeman races against time to save his daughter from a mysterious sickness spreading through a small village.

title: Blood and Ties
overview: A father-daughter relationship unexpectedly turns when she becomes suspicious that her father might be a monstrous child kidnapper.

title: The Spy Gone North
overview: In 1993, a South Korean army major goes undercover as a businessman to infiltrate a North Korean nuclear facility.

title: Confidential Assignment
overview: North Korean detective Lim Cheol-ryung (Hyun Bin) lost his wife and unit when his superior Cpt. Cha (Kim Joo-hyuk) betrayed him in order to steal engraving plates that print U.S. counterfeit bills. He joins a delegation to South Korea after learning that Cha has defected there. South Korean detective Kang (Yoo Hae-jin) is assigned to the covert joint investigation in order to find Cha.

title: The Face Reader
overview: After King Moonjong unexpectedly dies, Nae-kyung, a face reader used to identify traitors, faces a plot by Grand Prince Sooyang to usurp the throne.

title: Mercy for None
overview: After severing ties with his gang, a former gangster returns to uncover the truth behind his brother's death — embarking on a relentless path of revenge.

title: The Host
overview: When a girl is snatched by a monster that emerges to wreak havoc on Seoul, her family sets out to locate the beast and bring her back home.

title: Beyond Evil
overview: A seasoned detective and a young police officer on the rise team up to find and capture a serial killer whose crimes resemble a past cold case.

title: Monstrous
overview: Archaeologists are called in when a giant Buddha statue carrying a centuries-old curse appears in a rural town to consume the souls of villagers.

title: Army
overview: Follows one soldier’s journey through mandatory service in the South Korean military to reveal how he is shaped into being a part of the collective.

title: The Princess and the Matchmaker
overview: In the wake of prolonged famine, the palace arranges Princess Songhwa (Shim Eun-kyung)'s marriage in order to correct the misfortune. A renowned diviner, Seo Do-yoon (Lee Seung-gi), is brought in to find the perfect husband that will have the best marital harmony with the princess. From candidates from all over the country, 4 prospective husbands with different fate signs are shortlisted.

title: Devil in the Lake
overview: A young mother works as a caretaker for a wealthy old lady to pilfer her precious jewelry. She discovers that the mansion hides more than just riches.

title: Memory
overview: After being diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease, a successful lawyer clings to work and family love as his memory starts fading away.

title: Miracle: Letters to the President
overview: Based on a true story, a 17-year-old writes dozens of letters to the president in an effort to have a train station built in his small village.

title: Kim-Gun
overview: Hang onto your ejector seats as this nail-biting BBC documentary follows fighter pilot recruits as they battle it out to be selected to fly the British Royal Air Force's brand new F35 Lightning jet. With exclusive access, this series gives a breathtaking, cockpit-eye view of the hopefuls stepping into the danger zone as they aim to achieve their dreams of becoming Top Guns.

title: Not Others
overview: High schooler Kim Eun Mi's (Jeon Hye Jin) life changed forever when she gave birth to her daughter. Decades later, her child Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young) has grown up and Eun Mi has become a physical therapist. The two spend most of their time bickering, as Jin Hee still lives at home while working as a police officer – where she butts heads with station chief Eun Jae Won (Park Sung Hoon). Eun Mi’s life also becomes more complicated when she meets the mysterious and shy doctor Park Jin Hong (Ahn Jae Wook). Will this mother and daughter duo resolve their differences – and renew their bond of affection? This series was based on the webtoon “Strangers” by Jung Young Rong.

title: Daytime Drinking
overview: Post-breakup, Hyuk-jin's solo trip to Jeongseon spirals into chaos as misunderstandings and chance encounters spark unexpected adventures.

title: Tomorrow
overview: Made half-human and half-spirit by accident, a young man is employed by a company of grim reapers in the underworld to carry out special missions.

title: 5 Pattern Dragon Claws
overview: The Silver Fox reigns supreme in the fighting world after battling untold numbers of men with his ‘thunder foot’ technique—but his rule won’t last.

title: Snowy Road
overview: This gut-wrenching historical drama delves into the horrors endured by two teenage girls forced to become "comfort women" during the Japanese occupation of Korea.

title: A Stray Goat
overview: In an old village in southeastern Korea, a new student and his bullied classmate form a bond while confronting the harsh realities of school violence.

title: Doctor
overview: Incensed by his wife’s betrayal, a plastic surgeon uses his talents to punish her, ensnaring his innocent patients in his twisted quest for revenge.

title: Pawn
overview: Du-seok (Sung Dong Il) and Jong-bae (Kim Hie Won) are tough-rough private loan sharks who chase down a debtor to collect but end up taking Seung-yi (Park Soi), a 9-year-old girl, as a pawn. Du-seok and Jong-bae promise to watch Seung-yi until she gets adopted by a nice, rich family. But when they later realize that Seung-yi has been sent to the wrong place, Du-seok and Jong-bae bring her back home. Although Du-seok and Jong-bae are stuck with a child they didn’t bargain for, and Seung-yi is left with them as a pawn out of debt, a special bond forms between them.

title: The Tiger
overview: An ex-sharpshooter for Korea is hunting the country's last tiger, but Japanese forces and local poachers will stop at nothing to claim their prey.

title: Stand by Me
overview: A loving grandfather living with his grandson prepares for the boy’s future and tries to leave a special legacy for them after he learns he’s dying.

title: Believer
overview: A low-level drug dealer conspires with a dangerously ambitious cop to bring down a major cartel's psychotic kingpin in this electric crime thriller.

title: Money Flower
overview: As Kang Pil Joo plots to gain Cheong A Group, he shows how money controls people, not the other way around.

title: The Whirlwind
overview: A whirlwind power clash between the prime minister and deputy prime minister unravels the day the president suffers an assassination attempt.

title: Ditto
overview: A total lunar eclipse and a ham radio connect an engineering student and a sociology student living in the same dorm but from different time periods.

title: One-minded
overview: Shenanigans occur in an apartment shared by two Korean women as one of them brings home a man that she picked up in a club and two thieves invade the place. Meanwhile, a fan oscillates and observes.

title: Dongju: The Portrait of a Poet
overview: A biographical film based on the life and work of Korea's renowned poet, Yun Dong-ju. Born in the era of Japanese occupation of Korea, Dong-ju and his cousin Mong-gyoo grow up like brothers under one roof.

title: The Recipe
overview: Yoo-jin, a television producer, sees a tape of a notorious serial killer's last meal request of Hy-jin's soybean paste soup. Yoo-jin sets out to discover the recipe to this mysterious soup.

title: Doom Doom
overview: Having put music on hold to care for her unstable mother, Ina has a chance encounter that opens up an opportunity to become a DJ in Berlin.

title: Dwiju: Cursed Bo
overview: Ah-jin, a writer and aspiring professor, joins graduate students Hyun-ah and Woo-soo on an exhibition about the cursed prison "Dwi-ju." Ignoring the dark rumors, they dive into the project. But as their hidden desires awaken, so does the curse-slowly turning their reality into a nightmare.

title: Duel
overview: A man and his clone are caught up in a serial-murder case involving a detective’s daughter. One man is the killer, the other is falsely accused.

title: Dream
overview: Don't count them out! With hard work and dedication on lock, a group of homeless men train to compete in a global tournament — despite a cranky coach.

title: Diva
overview: Two friends have a freaky car accident in which one vanishes without a trace, and the other loses her memory and tries to piece together what ensued.

title: Love Again
overview: Bereaved over the death of his ex-girlfriend, a musician happens upon an enchanting piano song on YouTube and contacts the woman who performed it.

title: Larva
overview: Best buddies and fellow larvae Red and Yellow who have made their home in the gutter under a busy city street, play with objects that fall from above.

title: Live Stream
overview: A mysterious web link sent to a young man shows him a live stream of his girlfriend apparently passed out in the room of a diabolical stranger.

title: Romang
overview: In this heart-wrenching drama, an elderly couple married for forty-five years both begin to suffer from dementia. But even as their memories fade, their love only grows stronger.

title: Rugal
overview: A police detective who loses everything to a criminal organization seeks payback when he gains special abilities through biotechnology.

title: Reset
overview: The film "Reset" asks why the rescue of Korea's children and people was neglected on the fateful day the Sewol sank. "Reset" investigates the momentous sinking of the Sewol Ferry off the coast of South Korea.

title: Written
overview: An actor awakens with his organ ripped out, his night shrouded in mystery. Meanwhile, he's taking a life-changing role in a film dangerously similar to the deadly predicament. As reality and fantasy blur, the disturbing truth begins to unfold.

title: The Witch: Part 1. The Subversion
overview: When strange people start appearing in an adopted girl’s life, she falls into turmoil, as her seemingly ordinary world rapidly turns upside down.

title: Mother
overview: A devoted single mother assists her simple-minded adult son. After he is accused of a brutal murder, she fights for his innocence.

title: Mother
overview: Soo Jin and Hye Na befriend a single father and his son. With the kidnapping case now public, staying hidden becomes close to impossible

title: Mine
overview: Encaged in a gold-clad life of secrets and lies, two women in a conglomerate family seek to topple all that stands in their way of finding true joy.

title: Mission for the Dragon
overview: En un despliegue de artes marciales, dos hermanos juran vengar el asesinato de su padre y parten en busca del último hombre que lo vio con vida.

title: Manhole
overview: A man travels back and forth in time for his unrequited love. But things start to change in unexpected ways.

title: Manhole
overview: In the heart of the city, two sisters accidentally come across a serial killer who has turned the sewers beneath a manhole into his secret hideout.

title: Maggie
overview: After her romantic tryst is caught on X-Ray, a nurse goes into work to resign only to find that everyone but the head doctor has called in sick.

title: Feng Shui
overview: In Joseon, the opportunity for an ideal gravesite leads to betrayal among many, as control of the throne causes shifting alliances.

title: The Admiral: Roaring Currents
overview: Inspired by the events surrounding the 1597 Battle of Myeongryang in which Korea’s outmatched navy faced off against 300 Japanese enemy ships.

title: Bargain
overview: A story that unfolds as a big earthquake hits a motel where various people, for their own reasons and purposes, are bargaining 'body prices'.

title: Moving
overview: Children with superpowers and their parents with painful pasts face enormous dangers together.

title: Monstrum
overview: A bloodthirsty beast on a manhunt rages through the mountainous landscape as the plague rages in Korea during the Middle Ages.

title: Incomplete Life
overview: A series about a newbie employee who faces infinite obstacles at his workplace, but meets a warm-hearted mentor who he can rely on.

title: A Special Lady
overview: Na Hyun-jing, a charismatic female boss who turned a crime organization into a legal business enterprise, is planning to retire and start a new life. However, her decision to break clean from the past is met with obstacles from inside and out. In addition, Dae-shik, a vindictive prosecutor who was coerced by Hyun-jung to help build up the gang’s business, plots a revenge. When the existence of Hyun-jung’s son is revealed, he instantly becomes the target of all her enemies. Will she be able to save her son and leave the underworld?

title: Secret Sunshine
overview: Lee Chang-dong found breakout international acclaim with this searing portrayal of unimaginable loss and the fallacies of religious comfort. Featuring an astonishing performance from Cannes Best Actress-winner Jeon Do-yeon, Secret Sunshine marked Lee as one of South Korean cinema’s leading lights.

title: Secret Love Affair
overview: A young student pianist falls for his older, married piano teacher, facing societal judgment and moral challenges in their love.

title: Barbie
overview: After a scheming uncle arranges an adoption deal with an American man, the family must decide who goes with him: Soon-Young or Soon-Ja.

title: Anarchist from Colony
overview: Set in Korea’s Colonial era under Japanese rule, an unruly independence activist is targeted by the Japanese Ministry and tried for high treason.

title: Thirst
overview: From the acclaimed director of the global hit Old Boy comes a shockingly original vampire story with a chilling, erotic style. A blood transfusion saves the life of a priest, but also transforms him into a vampire. He struggles to control his insatiable thirst for blood until a love affair unleashes his darkest desires in deadly new ways. Hailed as “Daring, operatic, and bloody funny!” (Lisa Schwarzbaum, Entertainment Weekly), Thirst is a truly wicked love story that takes classic vampire lore to twisted new heights.

title: Peninsula
overview: Jung-seok, a soldier who previously escaped the diseased wasteland, relives the horror when assigned to a covert operation with two simple objectives: retrieve and survive.

title: The Cursed
overview: An intrepid reporter working to expose a corrupt IT conglomerate meets a teenager with a deadly power who knows the truth about the company’s CEO.

title: Burning
overview: A man agrees to watch an ex-neighbor’s cat while she goes on a trip and becomes suspicious of the man she brings back just before her disappearance.

title: House of Hummingbird
overview: Often ignored by her family, a 14-year-old finds her escape through roaming her neighborhood with her friend, experiencing all that life has to offer.

title: Payback: Money and Power
overview: Eun Yong, a money business titan and an affluent financial capitalist, has been living a life of a recluse in the pastures of Mongolia. Eun returns to Korea when his nephew Tae-chun and his late benefactor's daughter Joon-gyeong enlists his help. He prepares for war against corrupt powers to protect his beloved family and to avenge the death of a dear old friend.

title: Sunset in My Hometown
overview: Hak-soo is on the verge of completing his tv dreams when he hears that his father is in the hospital. He rushes home, but things aren't as they seem.

title: Metamorphosis
overview: A dishonored priest will have a chance to redeem himself when a powerful demon invades the Kang-gu house and just an exorcism may save them.

title: Boss
overview: Three unique contenders vie for the mob boss' chair. Soon-tae aims to conquer the nation with his Chinese restaurant Mimiru; Kang-pyo is obsessed with tango; and Pan-ho is the only one who truly wants the role. Undercover cop Tae-gyu infiltrates Mimiru as a delivery man, escalating the fierce battle into unpredictable chaos.

title: One Spring Night
overview: A chance meeting between a pharmacist and a librarian leads them to reevaluate their lives and sparks romance in this heartfelt drama series.

title: Lost to Shame
overview: After a successful career, an actor accepts a role as a trans woman, but struggles to find his character in the midst of his own identity crisis.

title: Black
overview: A man possessed by death and a woman who sees the departed must restore balance as earthly and afterworld forces collide dangerously.

title: Circle of Atonement
overview: A police detective who learns his daughter is having an affair with her teacher prompts an investigation that leads him into an unsolved murder.

title: Unforgivable
overview: A detective uncovers a diary revealing how a series of brutal murders are linked to family tragedy, revenge, and a mother’s quest for justice.

title: 3-Iron
overview: Tae-suk spends his nights breaking into empty homes. After sneaking into a mansion, he meets a lonely wife, and they begin a game of cat-and-mouse.

title: Possessed
overview: A reluctant clairvoyant joins forces with a brusque police detective hiding a soft heart to help him solve criminal cases using her psychic abilities.

title: Hit-and-Run Squad
overview: Internal Affair team has been disgraced while investigating a bribery case against the Police Commissioner and racer-turned-entrepreneur Jung Jae-chul. The second-in-command of the IA team, Lieutenant Eun Shi-yeon, is relegated to the Hit and Run Squad at Inchon PD. She meets Squad Captain Woo and constable Seo Min-jae, who has a natural instinct for cars and delinquent past. Eun also gets acquainted with Seo's family, who have met through car accidents. A hit and run case leads the squad to Jung as a prime suspect, Eun conducts a separate operation to acquire the black box in Jung's concept car. Jung, a reckless speed freak, chases Eun and it leads a tragic accident, costing someone's life. When Eun finds out the dirty deal behind her back, she cooperates with Seo to finally bring justice to Jung.

title: The Hunt
overview: Deep in the forest, woodsman and hunter Ki-sung risks everything in a deadly cat-and-mouse game to protect locals from gold-hungry intruders.

title: The Throne
overview: Set in 18th-century Korea, a long-ruling king uses any means possible to deal with his unruly son, who is accused of plotting treason.

title: The Divine Fury
overview: A boy rejects Christianity when his father dies. As an adult prizefighter, he is a top success until a demonic wound appears in his hand.

title: Devils Stay
overview: After his daughter dies during a violent exorcism, Seung-do senses a faint heartbeat during her funeral and sets out to prove she is still alive.

title: The Assassin
overview: A town’s most lethal assassin comes out of retirement to exact his own brand of vigilante justice after witnessing a campaign of terror on the locals.

title: Seobok
overview: An ex-secret agent with a terminal illness gets tasked to oversee the transfer of a top-secret project—a human clone named Seo Bok.

title: The Bequeathed
overview: After the death of an unknown uncle, a woman inherits a burial ground and finds herself in the center of a string of murders and dark secrets.

title: Snow In Sea Breeze
overview: After a youth of sickness left her lonely and shy, a young woman befriends a kindly aquarium employee. When he proposes marriage, their love affair brings the two great challenges.

title: Hope
overview: When their daughter gets abused by a stranger, two parents fall in utter despair, but set out to find hope for the sake of her happiness.

title: The Piper
overview: A gruesome retelling of the legendary Brothers Grimm classic! After the Korean War a flute-playing wanderer and his son arrives to a peaceful and remote village where he makes a deal to the chief to eradicate the uncontrollable rat infestation. Using his mystical flute he wipes the rats away from the village only to be paid with greed, corruption and betrayal while losing the ones he loves. Vowing for revenge he soon changes his tune and uses his magical flute to settle a score that will clean the land of filth once and for all!

title: Under the Queen's Umbrella
overview: A spirited queen tries to rein in her rowdy sons in order to make one of them the next king of Joseon, while her competitors vie to snatch the throne.

title: Twenty
overview: Three best friends in their twenties decide it’s time to live it up while they unleash their antics and zany bromance on every occasion.

title: The Stone
overview: A young and talented but aimless gambler is recruited by a gang boss to become his private tutor to master an abstract strategy board game.

title: The Match
overview: When a legendary Go master loses his title to a one-time friend and protégé, he sets out to reclaim it in a high-stakes battle of wits and skill.

title: Time
overview: From acclaimed director Kim Ki-Duk comes a seering examination of modern culture's obsession with youth and unattainable physical perfection.

title: Time
overview: Time is fairly applied to everyone. Each moment, these four people make different choices are entangled.

title: First Love
overview: A 17-year-old orphan living with his parents’ former caregiver begins to develop secret feelings for her but soon learns she’s suffering from disease.

title: Faith
overview: A warrior living in Goryeo dynasty meets a plastic surgeon living in the present day and both fight their way through the ordeals.

title: Missing
overview: Worried sick about her missing younger sister and rebuffed by police, Hyun Jung is forced on a solo search that sends her into a living nightmare.

title: Jackie and Bruce to the Rescue
overview: Returning home to learn his master was murdered in a massacre, Bruce teams up with rickshaw driver Jackie to trackdown the secret gang responsible.

title: Sunny
overview: A middle-aged woman strives to fulfill her friend's dying wish by reuniting their high school friends, despite her past unpopularity.

title: Search
overview: A specialized search team struggles to uncover secrets after a series of mysterious disappearances and murders on the front-line of the Korean DMZ.

title: Big Bang
overview: Fired from his job and abandoned by his wife, a mild-mannered ex-salesman cracks and turns into a wanted terrorist after one night of bad decisions.

title: Three
overview: Three Extremes took you to the edge, and now Three Extremes II plunges into another trilogy of nightmarish tales from Southeast Asia's hottest horror directors.

title: Revenant
overview: In this Korean occult mystery, a woman possessed by an evil spirit, and a man who can see evil spirits, uncover the secrets of mysterious deaths surrounding five spirits.

title: The Villainess
overview: Bloody revenge is at the heart of this stylish action-thriller that doses the classic femme fatale story with a shot of adrenaline as it follows a former assassin who will stop at nothing to cut ties to her past.

title: The Fierce One
overview: A hitman desperate to quit the life gets dragged back in to secure a stolen heroin shipment at the center of a tug of war between rival crime gangs.

title: Karma
overview: A fateful accident intertwines six lives in a thrilling tale of karma and crime, where each must face their own dark truths and connections.

title: Anna
overview: The story of a woman who ends up living a completely different life due to a petty lie.

title: Assassination
overview: Snipers. Marksmen. Hired Guns. Double Agents. A group of exiled rebels are planning a hit on an Army Commander in Japanese-occupied Korea, but the only killer for the job is in prison. Now, the Resistance must devise a  jailbreak, escape a hitman...and discover which of them is a traitor.

title: Warning: Do Not Play
overview: Mi-jung, an aspiring director, struggles to come up with ideas for a new horror film. One day, her friend tells her about a horror video which filmed by a ghost and was banned after an university graduation screening. Mi-jung is immediately intrigued by this rumor and starts to figure out the truth, even though that video director of tries to stop her. What's more, she starts writing herself into her movie...However, the closer she gets into the truth, strange things start to happen in her life. What will be happen to Mi-jung, if her movie and life become indistinguishable?

title: Aema
overview: In 1980s Korea, a movie star and a starlet defy male-dominated industry rules and backstage corruption while filming the provocative "Madame Aema."

title: The Anchor
overview: A nightly news anchor receives a distressing phone call from a mother saying that a man has broken into her house and will kill her.

title: Yaksha: Ruthless Operations
overview: On assignment in a perilous city to inspect a Black Ops team and its notorious leader, an upstanding prosecutor steps into a deadly war between spies.

title: The Ugly
overview: When Dong-hwan gets a phone call that his long lost mother's remains have been found forty years after she disappeared, it sends him on a twisted odyssey through his family's past, digging through years of grief and guilt to find the truth.

title: The Fatal Encounter
overview: One year into King Jeong-jo’s burgeoning reign, a fated day unfolds about one who must live, one who must kill, and one who must protect.

title: The King's Affection
overview: When the crown prince is killed, his twin sister assumes the throne while trying to keep her identity and affection for her first love a royal secret.

title: My Dearest
overview: Amid chaos as the Qing invade their kingdom of Joseon, a man with a mysterious past falls for a noblewoman who's already in love with another man.

title: Psychokinesis
overview: Suddenly possessed with supernatural powers, a father sets out to help his estranged daughter, who's at risk of losing everything she's lived for.

title: Youngju
overview: Struggling to care for her brother after their parents' accidental deaths, a young woman tries to ease her pain by seeking out the couple responsible.

title: WATCHER
overview: 15 years after their lives were changed by a brutal murder, three people form an internal investigation team to expose corruption in the police force.

title: Deadly Kick
overview: An Interpol agent on the trail of some stolen cash joins forces with a man working for a criminal organization to try and find it together.

title: Fairy
overview: After an accidental encounter, a pair of married cafe owners come to suspect that a wandering boy is behind their shop's sudden success.

title: Yonder
overview: Jaehyun receives an invitation from his late wife to a place called Yonder, a place created based on his wife's memories. Jaehyun accepts the invitation and is reunited with the love of his life at Yonder.

title: The Cage
overview: A tale of a man coming back to his troubled home-town becomes a meditation on the queer body and the geography of identity. By dislocating the narrative, this neo-noir film interrogates contemporary colonial relationships and troubles the filmmaker's relationship to 'the West'.

title: Idol
overview: Learning their son has just been involved in a hit and run, a politician and his wife must carefully maneuver the harrowing days that follow.

title: Fist Of Golden Monkey
overview: A young boy must learn Kung Fu like his father while helping keep the “secret manual” out of the wrong hands.

title: Wol-ha: Very Bad Moon Rising
overview: This found-footage style horror film unearths the eerie tale of Wol-ha, a Korean geisha who is falsely accused of a crime and later killed.

title: Eungyo
overview: The bond between a renowned aging poet and his shamefully untalented but devoted student is shaken by their shared desire for a teenage girl.

title: Moss
overview: After a religious leader's death, his son visits the rural village where he lived. There, he unearths many unsettling truths about his father.

title: Eve
overview: Determined to avenge her family, Lee La-el begins a dangerous dance of vengeance by infiltrating the powerful family responsible for destroying hers.

title: Hostage: Missing Celebrity
overview: One of Korea’s most famous actors awaits the gigantic ransom demanded by two brutal captors who have broadcast his kidnapping around the world.

title: Confession
overview: After receiving a miraculous heart transplant, a lawyer works to clear his falsely-accused father’s name and discover who really committed the murder.

title: Confession
overview: In an isolated cabin, a CEO accused of murdering his mistress recounts his story to his lawyer, who suspects he’s not telling her the whole truth.

title: Indian Pink
overview: A doctor with a good, successful life faces betrayal and a dire choice involving life or death after his girlfriend leaves him for someone new.

title: New Trial
overview: A murder of a taxi driver that turned Korea upside down. The lone witness was a teenager named Hyun-woo who was later forced into making a false confession by abusive cops. Ten years have passed, and Hyun-woo has spent almost half of his life in prison. When Joon-young, a desperate lawyer, learns of Hyun-woo’s case, he instinctively sees an opportunity. However, once Joon-young meets Hyun-woo in person, he feels the passion he had when he first dreamed of becoming a lawyer.

title: JUNG_E
overview: From director Yeon Sang-ho ("Train to Busan," "Hellbound"), this sci-fi action-drama explores the secret to humanity's strength in an AI-dominated world.

title: Josée
overview: Depicts the brightest moments of the unexpected romance between a woman with a physical disability and an easy-going college student.

title: Hellbound
overview: Unearthly beings deliver bloody condemnations, sending individuals to hell and giving rise to a religious group founded on the idea of divine justice.

title: The Culprit
overview: A victim's husband and the suspected murderer's wife come together to track the real killer, but both of them are hiding secrets from one another.

title: Chaw
overview: A rookie cop discovers a mutant boar, with a voracious appetite for human flesh, is responsible for a series of gruesome murders in a Korean village.

title: Rampant
overview: Released after ten years as a hostage of China’s Qing Dynasty, Prince Ganglim returns home to find it overtaken by a quickly spreading zombie plague.

title: Champ
overview: Blind jockey Seung-ho trains an injured horse named Woo-bak. After being disqualified from a race, they risk everything with one final shot.

title: Cheo Yong
overview: A detective who can commune with the dead solves crimes with the help of his partner and the ghost of a high school girl haunting the police station.

title: Blue Swallow
overview: The story of Park Kyung-won, one of Korea’s first female aviators, as she travels to Japan to pursue her childhood dream of becoming a pilot.

title: Overman
overview: Assigned library duty as a punishment for fighting, a high school gymnast soon bonds with a mysterious girl who has borrowed hundreds of books.

title: The Hypnosis
overview: A newfound interest in hypnotherapy to unlock lost memories leads a college student into a living nightmare inside the consciousness of a dead man.

title: Friend
overview: Four kids become best friends despite their differences, but years later they have all taken different paths and two of them have become rivals.

title: Heart Blackened
overview: When his daughter becomes the prime suspect in the death of his fiancée, a father takes matters into his own hands to save her and outwit the courts.

title: Carter
overview: A man wakes up missing his memories. Directed by a mysterious voice from a device in his ear, he sets off on a hostage rescue mission rife with danger.

title: Cart
overview: Sun-hee is a model employee of The Mart. Her goal is to be hired as a regular worker so she can support her two children. That's why she eagerly does what the company demands, even if the demands sometimes are not fair. However, the company policy has changed; the contract-based workers must be outsourced. Sun-hee and her co-workers protest the decision, but the company never offers a proper explanation. Irregular employees form a union and try to negotiate with the company, only to be left out and completely ignored. When the union strikes and takes over the store, the company does whatever necessary to dissolve the protesters.

title: Kingdom
overview: While strange rumors about their ill king grip a kingdom, the crown prince becomes their only hope against a mysterious plague overtaking the land.

title: Don't Buy the Seller
overview: After buying a faulty washing machine online, Soo-hyun reports the seller to the police, unaware that he is a psychopathic serial killer.

title: The Tower
overview: It's Christmas Eve at the luxurious 108-storey Tower Sky twin tower building in central Seoul. Residents and staff members busy themselves with the upcoming Christmas party that night. Helicopters are hired to circle the building and spray a spectacle of snow during the Christmas celebrations. Their amazement soon turns into terror when one of the helicopters loses control, crashing into the building, setting off a chain off horrifying events that threatens the lives of all the residents.

title: The Murky Stream
overview: In lawless Joseon, the once-clear Gyeonggang River has turned into a murky stream. Siyul hides a troubled past, Choi Eun dreams of becoming the country's greatest merchant, and Jung Chun aspires to be an upright official. Their fates intertwine as they each fight to shape a world of their own.

title: Dear Hongrang
overview: When a long-missing heir returns with lost memories, love and suspicion entwine. Is he truly Hongrang, or a stranger disturbing hearts and family ties?

title: Escape
overview: After completing his required decade of military service and being honored as a hero, a North Korean sergeant makes a sudden shocking attempt to defect to the South, risking life and limb for the chance to finally determine his own destiny.

title: Tunnel
overview: A homicide detective is struck on the head in 1986 while chasing a serial killer through a tunnel. He wakes up 30 years later in the very same spot.

title: Tunnel
overview: When a tunnel collapses on a man, it leaves him struggling for his life alone in the suffocating darkness, while a rescue operation tries to save him.

title: Trap
overview: A hard-boiled crime thriller of a man trapped by the 'man hunters', hiding unsuspected truth enough to twist the whole story.

title: The Old Woman with the Knife
overview: A legendary assassin in her sixties is targeted by a young killer seeking revenge. As her body betrays her and enemies close in, she unleashes decades of lethal skill in a final, explosive fight for survival.

title: Exhuma
overview: "EXHUMATION OF AN OMINOUS GRAVE UNLEASHES DREADFUL CONSEQUENCES BURIED UNDERNEATH. After suffering from serial paranormal events, a wealthy family living in LA summons a young rising shaman duo Hwa-rim (Kim Go-eun) and Bong-gil (Lee Do-hyun) to save the newborn of the family. Once they arrive, Hwa-rim senses a dark shadow of their ancestor has latched on the family, so-called a ‘Grave’s Calling’. In order to exhume the grave and relieve the ancestor, Hwa-rim seeks help from the top-notch geomancer Sang-duk (Choi Min-sik) and the mortician Young-geun (Yoo Hai-jin). To their dismay, the four find the grave at a shady location in a remote village in Korea. Unaware of the consequences, the exhumation is carried out, yet this rather unleashes a malevolent force buried underneath…"

title: Puzzle
overview: A man with a great career and a loving wife and child goes out drinking and meets a mysterious woman. The next day he awakes to find he is a murderer.

title: Closed School
overview: After a car accident that leaves them all unconscious, a group of high school friends awaken in a shuttered school they once previously attended.

title: The Tyrant
overview: A secret project in Korea is exposed to the US. Who will seize the sample in the end?

title: Havana
overview: A rookie lawyer contends with a nasty prosecutor, a mysterious judge, and murky facts while defending a woman accused of brutally killing her husband.

title: The Target
overview: An ex-mercenary has 36 hours to piece together the clues to understand why he’s the target of a larger conspiracy and save a pregnant woman’s life.

title: The Housemaid
overview: In this suspenseful thriller, a forbidden affair between a young maid and her wealthy employer spirals into obsession and deadly betrayal.
